title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise and Nvidia Extend Their AI Collaboration
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) announced it's extending a collaboration with Nvidia (NVDA) to boost its reach into generative artificial intelligence (AI).

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise collaborates with NVIDIA to deliver an enterprise-class, full-stack GenAI solution
text: BARCELONA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) announced an expanded strategic collaboration with NVIDIA to build an enterprise computing solution for generative AI (GenAI). The co-engineered, pre-configured AI tuning and inferencing solution enables enterprises of any size to quickly customize foundation models using private data and deploy production applications anywhere, from edge to cloud. The offering removes the complexity of developing and deploying GenAI infrastruct.

title: Ofinno Slashes Cloud Costs Up to 90% with HPE GreenLake
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--After incubating its research lab in the public cloud, Ofinno is moving to the private cloud and expects to save up to 90% on monthly operational costs and speed innovation by using the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform from Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE). Founded in 2011, Ofinno, a fast-growing, leading-edge research and development lab for 5G, Wi-Fi, and immersive media technologies, has sold more than 500 patents to companies in consumer electronics, auto.

title: HP Enterprise swings to a profit in fiscal 1Q on hybrid could, AI strength
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co (NYSE:HPE) shares rose 0.6% in extended trading Tuesday after the company swung to a profit in its fiscal fourth-quarter results.  The information technology company posted a profit of $642 million, compared to a loss of $304 million in the year-ago quarter.

text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. dipped slightly in extended trading Tuesday after the computing giant reported quarterly results that were in line with analysts' estimates and touted promising AI sales.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise looks to extend EPS surprise streak on Tuesday
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co (NYSE:HPE) will report earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, when the company will look to beat earnings expectations as it has each of the last four quarters.  The business-to-business group IT services group is expected to report fiscal fourth-quarter earnings of $0.50 per share on revenue of $7.36 billion.

title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) GreenLake to Optimize Swisslog Operations
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) announces that its GreenLake has been selected by Germany-based automated logistics solutions company, Swisslog GmbH.

title: 3 Edge Computing Stocks Accelerating the Data Revolution
text: With edge computing, all of the data collecting and processing are carried out by computers located close to where the user is based rather than data centers located far from the user. Edge computing enables processes to be carried out much more quickly than when data centers are involved.

title: Swisslog advances customer experience with next-gen private cloud from Hewlett Packard Enterprise
text: BOEBLINGEN, Germany--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Swisslog GmbH has selected HPE GreenLake for Private Cloud Enterprise to accelerate the delivery of IT managed services for intralogistics automation and to advance customer experience. The new platform will enable Swisslog to deploy new IT services within minutes and automate the resolution of support cases to ensure a frictionless operation of customers' intralogistic automation. title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) & Sauber Tie Up to Enhance Formula One
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) partners with Sauber Motorsport AG to enhance the aerodynamic performance of the latter's Formula One race cars.

title: Sauber Motorsport AG Taps HPE GreenLake to Advance Formula One Race Car Aerodynamics
text: WALLISELLEN, Switzerland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Sauber Motorsport AG is partnering with HPE to advance aerodynamics of its Formula One race cars. The teams jointly developed a high performance computing (HPC) system for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) which significantly increases computing performance compared to the previous system. title: OpenAI's German rival raises $500M from SAP, Hewlett Packard Enterprise and others
text: A new challenger to Open AI's pole position in the large language model market has emerged in Germany.  Aleph Alpha, a startup company in the country, announced Monday that it has raised $500 million from Bosch, SAP and Hewlett Packard Enterprise in a round of series B funding.

title: UK Government Invests £225m to Create UK's Most Powerful AI Supercomputer With University of Bristol and Hewlett Packard Enterprise
text: BRISTOL, England--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As part of the UK Government's investment in a national AI Research Resource, The University of Bristol and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that HPE has been selected to deliver the UK's fastest supercomputer thanks to £225m of Government funding. title: UK invests $273 million in AI supercomputer as it seeks to compete with U.S., China
text: The investment comes as the U.K. hosts its landmark AI safety summit, which is being held in Bletchley Park, the home of the World War Two codebreakers.

title: HPE Partner Ready Vantage Accelerates Growth Opportunities for Partners of All Sizes
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced updates to HPE Partner Ready Vantage, the program designed to better enable partners to deliver as-a-service solutions.
